case_title: MONIQUE ALM ROSA OREA VS. KARL LABARENT

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED**

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MONIQUE ALM ROSA OREA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS KARL LABARENT AND WENJE JACKIE LI ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED NOV-20-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LABARENT, KARL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-28-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSA OREA, MONIQUE ALM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, WENJIE JACKIE $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,725.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ROSA OREA, MONIQUE ALM LABARENT, KARL LI, WENJIE JACKIE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROSA OREA, MONIQUE ALM AS TO DEFENDANT LABARENT, KARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION TO AMEND THE CLAIM. ADDING ONE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSA OREA, MONIQUE ALM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY ROSA OREA, MONIQUE ALM LABARENT, KARL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-01-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MONIQUE ALM ROSA OREA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARL LABARENT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CONTINIUANCE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE ANOTHER DEFENTANT AND GET THEM SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROSA OREA, MONIQUE ALM AS TO DEFENDANT LABARENT, KARL
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSA OREA, MONIQUE ALM
